question: Which year from 2011-2016 has the highest birth rate for females ages 15-19 in the United States? Your response should be in the format [Answer].
practical_motivation: A public health researcher is reviewing the peak teen birth rate year in the early 2010s.

1.fact: Filtering to Age Group = "15-19 Years" for 2011-2016, the highest Birth Rate is in 2011 at 31.3.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2011-2016 has the highest birth rate for females ages 15-19 in the United States? (Filter Age Group == "15-19 Years"; select the maximum Birth Rate.)

reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which year from 2011-2016 has the highest birth rate for females ages 15-19? (Filter Age Group == "15-19 Years"; select the maximum Birth Rate.) The answer is 2011.
